title: Feen Fenoob

{{Quote|Be happy to give you what's coming to you.|Fenoob pretends he is willing to pay his debt before stunning his captors|<ref name="DM2" />}}
'''Feen Fenoob''' was a bald, [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] who had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and lived during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Through [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]], he came to owe a large debt to the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]] [[Darnada]]. Fenoob failed to pay off the debt leading to two of Darnada's thugs tracking him down on the [[Deep Space Demolition and Removal]] [[Space station/Legends|Space station]]. Fenoob escaped the thugs but was killed by the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] immediately afterwards.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Me and Gargachykk, we just want to talk to you about the money you owe Darnada. You remember that, right? Gambling's such an unfortunate habit.|Asa Naga greets Fenoob after catching him|<ref name="DM2" />}}
[[File:GargaGronk.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Gargachykk and Asa Naga capture Fenoob.]]
By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] Feen Fenoob had amassed a debt through [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]], which he owed to the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Darnada]], a [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization. In that year, Darnada sent two of his men, [[Asa Naga]] and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gargachykk]], to track down Fenoob on board the [[Deep Space Demolition and Removal]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]], which the vigo used as a base of operations. Fenoob attempted to escape the pair, but only succeeded in wearing himself out before they confronted him in one of the station's [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]] where the Sullustan tried to hide. Naga reminded him of the debt and claimed that he believed the Sullustan would pay up, although also mentioning the fact that Gargachykk doubted it. After Naga threatened to have the Wookiee pull Fenoob's arms out of their sockets, the Sullustan stunned the pair with several [[Flash detonator/Legends|flash globes]] he was carrying and fled. His escape was cut short, though, as the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] bisected the fleeing debtee with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], hoping to use the Sullustan's [[Death/Legends|death]] as a mean of earning Naga's trust so that he would be granted audience with Darnada.<ref name="DM2" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Out of the way!|Fenoob panics while trying to escape Darnada's men|<ref name="DM2" />}}
Fenoob gambled to a point where he owed a large debt to the dangerous criminal Darnada. He attempted to flee Darnda's thugs when he discovered they were after him, becoming panicked as he did. Upon being caught he managed to outwit his captors—one of whom claimed he believed Fenoob would pay the debt while the other didn't—and stun them to escape, making sarcastic comment as he did so. As a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], Fenoob was bald, with pale colored skin and [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. At the time of his death he wore an orange [[Clothing/Legends|jacket]] and shirt with a pair of brown pants.<ref name="DM2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Feen Fenoob first appeared in [[2000]] in [[Darth Maul (2000) 2|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 2]] a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] in the [[Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul'']] series written by [[Ron Marz]] and illustrated by [[Jan Duursema]]. He later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]].
